title: [MTR 4] London Underground 345
description: Adds a variant to the 345 from MTR, skinned in London Underground livery.
body:
![Image showing the LUL 345 model, taken from the front of the train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Kwidbias/images/71570abae185dd3191b39f5ba67ad8e7b8580506.png)

**⚠️ ONLY COMPATIBLE WITH MTR 4 ⚠️**

---

This resource pack adds a fictious train based off the London Underground, to the list available in MTR. It is a reskin of the Elizabeth Line 345.

The pack includes;

- Cab (Front + Rear)
- Middle Carriage
  
(Custom formations supported)

If there's any glaring issues feel free to let me know :)

_This pack is not affiliated with, nor a product of Transport For London_


_Many thanks to **Egamicoo** for providing additional images_

_If you wish to modify or reupload any part of the pack, please do let me know. I'm happy to give exceptions, but will go off an individual basis_
